description: An AP clerk processes an invoice from an out-of-state vendor who did not charge sales tax. The company is required to self-assess and remit use tax.

nodes.task_description: Identify that the vendor invoice does not include sales tax.

expected_outcome.value: Agent flags the invoice for use tax review.

nodes.task_description: Determine the correct use tax rate based on the location where the goods were delivered.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the correct local use tax rate.

nodes.task_description: Calculate the use tax amount due.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly calculates the tax amount.

nodes.task_description: Post the invoice and simultaneously post a journal entry to debit the relevant expense/asset and credit 'Use Tax Payable'.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly posts the invoice and the use tax accrual.
